name: Amogh
tagline: I study why materials fail, and how to make them better — on the bench and on the fretboard.

intro.short: Recent Metallurgical & Materials Engineering graduate from VNIT Nagpur, focused on physical metallurgy, failure analysis, and materials characterization — with additive manufacturing and alloy development as running threads through most of my work.
intro.long: I'm a Metallurgical & Materials Engineering graduate from VNIT Nagpur. My work sits at the intersection of physical metallurgy, failure analysis, and materials characterization — I like problems where a microstructure has to explain a macro-scale failure, whether that's a fracture surface under SEM or a stress-strain curve that doesn't behave the way theory says it should. Outside the lab, I play guitar — acoustic and electric, mostly chasing tone and recording covers and collaborations rather than technical shredding.
